description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender, vertically ribbed pole with a slightly flared base, giving it a sturdy and classic appearance. At the top, a single lantern-style lamp head is mounted, characterized by a square, slightly tapered housing with a dark, metallic frame and yellow-tinted glass panels. The lamp head is capped with a decorative, gently sloped roof and small finials at each corner, evoking a traditional European streetlight aesthetic. The post itself appears to be made of cast metal, likely iron or steel, with a matte, dark finish. The overall design is utilitarian yet elegant, suitable for urban streets, parks, or historic neighborhoods. No signage, banners, or additional attachments are visible on the structure.
description: A tall, ribbed metal lamppost with a classic lantern-style lamp head featuring yellow-tinted glass and decorative finials. The design is traditional and sturdy, ideal for urban or park settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the lamppost, with the lantern head and its decorative roof and finials clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, highlighting the symmetry and vertical ribbing of the post.
description_view_2: Rear view, mirroring the front, with the lantern head and post details unchanged.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the same features as the front and side, emphasizing the uniform design.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Square lantern with a gently sloped roof, yellow-tinted glass panels, and decorative finials at each corner.
